---
title: "Jingyuan Yang"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/jingyuanyang
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kayyang-bu
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kayyang@bu.edu
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resume
      href: cv.pdf
---

Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics candidate at Boston University, 
with a background in data analytics, machine learning, and big data engineering.

Currently exploring generative AI applications in finance through coursework 
on RAG systems with SEC 10-K filings, and big data salary analytics on AWS EC2.

## Experience

**Kuaishou** — Data Analyst  
Driver onboarding analysis project.

**Poizon** — Data Analyst  
Built data warehouse and visualization dashboard identifying Medicare Advantage 
benefit enrollment opportunity gaps using CMS, Medicaid, SNAP, and Census datasets.

## Education

**Boston University** — M.S. Applied Business Analytics
**The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shen Zhen** - B.B.A Finance

## Skills

Python · SQL · R · PySpark · AWS · Tableau · Plotly · scikit-learn

## Resume

[Download my CV (PDF)](CV_Jingyuan Yang.pdf)
